project_type: Node.js/TypeScript automation service with Express server-rendered dashboard
build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, tsx for dev
test_framework: vitest with --run flag, test files colocated as *.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compiles. 2. Run npx vitest --run to run all tests.
environment_constraints: Node.js project, vitest for testing, no Docker daemon needed for verification - just tsc and vitest
contribution_requirements: Standard TypeScript project - compile clean, tests pass
key_patterns: Server-rendered HTML views (template functions returning strings in src/dashboard/views/). Express Router in dashboard-routes.ts. WorkflowManager class handles CRUD and poll cycles. ActivityEntry in activity-store.ts. Credentials saved as JSON files in credentials/ directory. Processed rows tracked per-workflow in processed-rows-{workflowId}.json files.
directory_structure: src/config/ - config loading, src/dashboard/ - Express routes and HTML views, src/health/ - health check server, src/logger/ - structured logger, src/poller/ - Google Sheets polling, src/publisher/ - Buffer GraphQL client, src/service/ - automation orchestrator, src/validator/ - row validation, src/workflows/ - workflow manager
